title: hordeum jubatum
intro: Hordeum jubatum, also known as blue grama or blue wheat grass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hordeum jubatum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menopause. Hordeum jubatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
